zh.lifeSummary: 當Olof Esbjörnsson於1520年出生在瑞典達拉納格朗亞德時，他的父親Esbjörn Olofsson15歲，母親Gölin Esbjörnsdotter21歲。他和Kerstin Persdotter Flemming至少有6個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1570年在他的家鄉享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Olof Esbjörnsson于1520年出生在瑞典達拉納格朗亞德时，他的父亲Esbjörn Olofsson15岁，母亲Gölin Esbjörnsdotter21岁。他和Kerstin Persdotter Flemming至少有6个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1570年在他的家乡享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Olof
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Olaf . St Olof , King of Sweden ( d. c.950 ) was murdered by his rebellious heathen subjects for refusing to sacrifice to idols.

historicEvents.title: The Stockholm Bloodbath
historicEvents.description: A mass execution of Swedish nobles by Danish king Christian II is known as the Stockholm Bloodbath. Christian II invaded Sweden in 1519 and took hold of Stockholm in September 1520. Over 80 nobles were executed for heresy on November 8 and 9. The outrage from the executions led to the Swedish removal of support of the Kalmar Union.

historicEvents.title: Swedish War of Liberation
historicEvents.description: The Swedish War of Liberation was a civil war led by nobleman Gustav Vasa. As Christian II heard of the rebellion, he confronted Vasa's men, who won the battle at Brunbacks Ferry. Christian II was defeated by the Swedes in Stockholm and a truce was agreed upon. Vasa was given as a hostage as a show of good faith until the treaty was signed. The Danish King did not keep his word and Vasa was held as a prisoner for two years until his escape. A bounty was placed on Vasa's head. Vasa worked to inspire many to join his cause and lived under disguise until the Danes surrendered in 1525.

historicEvents.title: First Full Swedish Translation of the Bible
historicEvents.description: The first full Swedish translation of the Bible, known as the Gustav Bible, was completed by Olaus Petri and Laurentius Andreae and published in 1540.

historicEvents.title: Sweden Becomes Lutheran Nation
historicEvents.description: Sweden officially declared itself a Lutheran nation in 1544.
Peace of Stettin concluded. Denmark recognized independence of Sweden. Sweden gave up claim to Norway.

en.lifeSummary: When Olof Esbjörnsson was born in 1520, in Grangärde, Dalarna, Sweden, his father, Esbjörn Olofsson, was 15 and his mother, Gölin Esbjörnsdotter, was 21. He had at least 6 sons and 3 daughters with Kerstin Persdotter Flemming. He died in 1570, in his hometown, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Olof Esbjörnsson est né en 1520, à Grangärde, Dalarna, Suède, son père, Esbjörn Olofsson, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Gölin Esbjörnsdotter, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles avec Kerstin Persdotter Flemming. Il est décédé en 1570, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Olof Esbjörnsson 1520 in Grangärde, Dalarna, Schweden geboren wurde, war sein Vater Esbjörn Olofsson 15 und seine Mutter Gölin Esbjörnsdotter 21. Er hatte mit Kerstin Persdotter Flemming mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1570 im Alter von 50 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Olof Esbjörnsson è nato il nel 1520 nel Grangärde, Dalarna, Svezia, il suo padre, Esbjörn Olofsson, aveva 15 anni e il suo madre, Gölin Esbjörnsdotter, aveva 21 anni. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie con Kerstin Persdotter Flemming. Morì nel 1570, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Olof Esbjörnssonが1520年にスウェーデンダラーナグラングaルドで生まれた時，父Esbjörn Olofssonは15歳，母Gölin Esbjörnsdotterは21歳であった。彼はKerstin Persdotter Flemmingとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1570年に故郷で50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Olof Esbjörnsson(이)가 1520년 스웨덴 다라른아 그랑a르드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Esbjörn Olofsson(은)는 15세였고, 그의 어머니 Gölin Esbjörnsdotter(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Kerstin Persdotter Flemming(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1570년 그의 고향에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Olof Esbjörnsson nasceu em 1520, em Grangärde, Dalarna, Suécia, seu pai, Esbjörn Olofsson, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Gölin Esbjörnsdotter, tinha 21 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas com Kerstin Persdotter Flemming. Ele faleceu em 1570, em sua cidade natal, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Olof Esbjörnsson родился в 1520 г. в местности грангaрд, даларна, Швеция, его отцу по имени Esbjörn Olofsson было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Gölin Esbjörnsdotter, 21. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери от Kerstin Persdotter Flemming. Он умер в 1570 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Olof Esbjörnsson nació en 1520, en Grangärde, Dalarna, Suecia, su papá, Esbjörn Olofsson, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Gölin Esbjörnsdotter, tenía 21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas con Kerstin Persdotter Flemming. Murió en 1570, en su pueblo, a la edad de 50 años.
